title: How design makes change legible
key_points: Argues that as teams ship agents, products, and features at unprecedented pace, maintaining clarity for both teams and users becomes harder, and design is uniquely positioned to create coherence across brands, teams, and experiences.
Draws on lessons from scaling Superhuman and integrating new products into the business to illustrate how design can hold things together amid rapid change.
Calls on design leaders to expand their role beyond managing craft toward shaping strategy.
